## Meeting Purpose

[Review and negotiate GrowthX's Statement of Work (SOW) for Alex.com's content strategy and production.](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Alex.com is seeking a more budget-friendly, shorter-term commitment to test GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed adjusting to $20K for strategy sprint + $12K/month for 6 months execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Content production estimate: \~10 articles/week at $15K/month, potentially adjustable](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Alex.com to review revised proposal with leadership for quick decision](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Strategy Sprint and Execution Phase

  - [Strategy sprint ($20K, 8 weeks) includes:](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [Deep product/company understanding](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
      - [Developing key artifacts (company brief, persona docs, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [Initial content production (20+ articles possible)](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Opportunity to opt-out after sprint](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Execution phase (initially proposed at $15K/month):](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [Typically 10 articles/week, adjustable based on complexity](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [Customization of workflows and content types](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
      - [Potential for thought leadership, market research, competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Budget and Commitment Concerns

  - [Alex.com expressed hesitation about initial $20K + $15K/month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Requested shorter term (6 months) and lower monthly rate](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [GrowthX open to adjusting to $12K/month for 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Total deal value discussed: \~$150K (initial proposal) vs \~$92K (adjusted)](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Content Production and Value

  - [GrowthX emphasized flexibility in content types and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Potential for custom workflows, thought leadership, and market research pieces](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Kyle highlighted cost-effectiveness compared to in-house or other agency options](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

### Contract Structure and Timing

  - [Current SOW allows for adjustments post-strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [GrowthX aiming to finalize agreement quickly for potential next week start](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Competing interest from other clients for the same start date](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to discuss revised terms ($20K sprint + $12K/month for 6 months) with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [GrowthX to send updated SOW reflecting new terms](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Donald to review revised proposal with Aaron (Alex.com leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Aim to finalize agreement by tomorrow for potential next week kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/ketky7DdvTFfZjkDhxpnryk8PD3TyHx1?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
